creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 189881
Fix attempt to reinitialize read-only memory

(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #18)
> Re-open,  the segfault wasn't fixed.

Indeed, please also apply the patch for hotspot/src/share/vm/services/memTracker.cpp, otherwise it will still attempt to reinitialize read-only memory.
